creator: naxreg@gmail.com
text:
i have a baytrail device STCK1A32WFC (it's a hdmi micro pc stick). And i think it have the efi64 (linux and bsd boot).
The problem on bsd is the i915 driver (Freebsd,Openbsd not recognize it well and stuck with vesa/fbsd driver)

Sound not work
Bluetooth not work
Wifi not work

only nomadBSD with some special pkg can start Xorg and Xfce4 so i think freebsd can...

bios is very restricted!

Why freebsd not have initGfx like nomad? 

and sound under HDMI-1 need to be performed under video driver?
